rationale: Section 7.028 governs TEA compliance monitoring authority for school districts and charter schools. It does not address homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values. No direct conflict with increasing the Tax Code §11.13(b) exemption.
quote: the agency may monitor compliance with requirements applicable to a process or program provided by a school district, campus, program, or school granted charters under Chapter 12
_note: No conflict. §7.028 addresses compliance monitoring scope; proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) operates in a different statutory domain. Any fiscal impact on school funding would flow through Chapter 48 formulas, not this monitoring provision.
